UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a student's profile within the CollegeConnect platform, storing personal information, game scores, and earned badges.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

email.description: The user's email address, used for identification. (Not for storing authentication credentials).

firstName.description: The first name of the student.

lastName.description: The last name of the student.

collegeId.description: Reference to the College the student belongs to.

collegeName.description: The full name of the student's college.

bio.description: A short biographical description provided by the student.

interests.description: A list of academic or professional interests.

profileImageUrl.description: URL to the student's profile picture.

highScore.description: The highest score achieved by the student across all games.

badgeNames.description: A list of names of badges earned by the student.

enrolledCourseIds.description: References to Courses the student is enrolled in.

ChatConversation.title: ChatConversation
ChatConversation.description: Represents a chat conversation, which can be one-to-one or a group chat.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ChatConversation entity.

participantIds.description: References to UserProfiles participating in this conversation.

adminId.description: The UID of the user who has administrative control over this group.

name.description: The name of the group chat.

description.description: A brief description of the group's purpose.

category.description: The thematic category of the group.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the conversation was initiated.

lastMessageTimestamp.description: The timestamp of the most recent message in the conversation.

GroupJoinRequest.title: GroupJoinRequest
GroupJoinRequest.description: A request from a student to join a specific community group.

groupAdminId.description: The UID of the administrator who must approve this request.

definition.description: Represents a chat conversation. Admin control is tracked via adminId.
Requests to join a group, pending admin approval.
